prompt: Create a dramatic football transfer announcement poster for {argument name="player name" default="Bukayo Saka"} joining {argument name="club name" default="FC Barcelona"}. Use a vertical 4:5 sports-poster composition with a deep electric blue and crimson red color grade, high contrast lighting, cinematic shadows, subtle glow, and premium social-media graphic design styling. Center a large chest-up portrait of the player wearing the {argument name="jersey description" default="2024/25 FC Barcelona home shirt with Spotify sponsor"}, facing forward with a serious confident expression. Behind him, place a much larger low-opacity side portrait of the same player on the right side as a background layer, tinted dark blue. Add a huge faint FC Barcelona crest spanning the middle background, blended into the red-blue gradient. At the very top center, place 2 club identifiers: the FC Barcelona crest and above it a small vertical red-and-blue striped motif. On the upper left, include the text “MÉS QUE UN CLUB” in small gold uppercase letters. On the left lower-middle, create a bold typographic name stack with 2 lines: small gold uppercase first name “BUKAYO” above very large white condensed sans-serif “SAKA”. Below that, add 2 welcome lines in uppercase: “BENVINGUT” in white and “AL BARÇA” in red. Add a gold handwritten-style signature reading “B. Saka” with the number “7” beneath it. In the foreground near the lower center, place a full-body action pose of the same player running forward with arms stretched wide in celebration, wearing the same Barcelona kit, navy socks, light boots, and a white wrist wrap. At the bottom, show a stylized illuminated view of Spotify Camp Nou curving across the width of the poster in dark blue with red highlights, with small visible stadium text “SPOTIFY CAMP NOU”. In the bottom left corner, include 2 small lines of text: “FC BARCELONA” in gold and “2024/25” in red. Add a small gold sleeve detail on the right shoulder area. Keep the layout clean, layered, modern, and aspirational, like an elite club transfer reveal graphic. Use sharp photo-illustration compositing, realistic fabric texture, glossy highlights, and polished poster finish.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张极具戏剧性的足球转会官宣海报，主题为 {argument name="player name" default="Bukayo Saka"} 加入 {argument name="club name" default="FC Barcelona"}。采用 4:5 比例的竖版体育海报构图，运用深电光蓝与深红色的色调，强调高对比度光影、电影级阴影、微弱光晕以及高级社交媒体平面设计风格。画面中心放置一张球员胸部以上的正面肖像，身穿 {argument name="jersey description" default="2024/25 赛季 FC Barcelona 主场球衣（含 Spotify 赞助商标志）"}，表情严肃自信。在其身后右侧，放置一张该球员更大尺寸、低透明度的侧面肖像作为背景层，并叠加深蓝色调。在背景中部添加一个巨大的、若隐若现的 FC Barcelona 队徽，并与红蓝渐变背景融合。在顶部正中央放置 2 个俱乐部标识：FC Barcelona 队徽，其上方为一个小的垂直红蓝条纹图案。在左上方，以金色小号大写字母添加文字“MÉS QUE UN CLUB”。在左侧中下方，创建两行醒目的排版文字：上方为金色小号大写字母“BUKAYO”，下方为超大号白色紧凑型无衬线字体“SAKA”。在其下方，添加两行大写欢迎词：白色“BENVINGUT”和红色“AL BARÇA”。添加一个金色手写风格签名“B. Saka”，下方标注数字“7”。在前景靠近底部中央的位置，放置该球员全身奔跑庆祝的动作姿态，双臂张开，身穿同样的 Barcelona 球衣、深蓝色球袜、浅色球鞋及白色护腕。在底部，展示一张风格化的 Spotify Camp Nou 体育场发光全景图，横跨海报底部，呈现深蓝色调并带有红色高光，可见微小的“SPOTIFY CAMP NOU”体育场文字。在左下角，包含两行小字：“FC BARCELONA”（金色）和“2024/25”（红色）。在右肩区域添加一个金色袖口细节。保持布局整洁、层次分明、现代且富有感染力，呈现出顶级俱乐部转会官宣图的质感。运用锐利的照片合成技术、逼真的织物纹理、光泽高光以及精致的海报后期处理。

breakdown.creativeCore: Saka 巴塞罗那转会海报：一张电影质感的足球转会官宣海报，展示身穿 FC Barcelona 球衣的 Bukayo Saka，非常适合社交媒体发布及球迷概念艺术创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
